message:
test(fcp-conformance/symbol-ack): pin SymbolAck transcript binding (br-cwg53)

SymbolAck (fcp-protocol/src/fcps.rs) is the receiver-side
acknowledgment that closes a symbol-transfer exchange. Its transcript
binds to (object_id, zone_id, zone_key_id, epoch_id,
recipient_node_id, request_nonce, reason, final_symbol_count). The
fuzz target mesh_post_verify_symbol_ack covers post-verify mesh
handling but no conformance test pinned the transcript binding
itself. A regression that dropped any field would silently allow
captured-ack repurpose — most dangerously a forged Complete in place
of a BudgetExceeded.

Adds 12 tests against the public fcp_protocol::SymbolAck API:

- round_trip_sign_then_verify_passes
- ack_signed_under_one_key_does_not_verify_under_another
- transcript_binds_to_object_id
- transcript_binds_to_zone_id
- transcript_binds_to_zone_key_id (key-rotation defense)
- transcript_binds_to_epoch_id (cross-epoch replay defense)
- transcript_binds_to_recipient_node_id (cross-recipient
  delivery-confusion defense)
- transcript_binds_to_request_nonce (per-exchange replay defense)
- transcript_binds_to_reason_complete_vs_cancelled
- transcript_binds_to_reason_complete_vs_budget_exceeded
- transcript_binds_to_final_symbol_count (metric integrity)
- header_field_is_not_part_of_signed_transcript (pins the documented
  separation: header is context-only, mutating it must NOT break
  existing acks)

All 12 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
symbol_ack_signing_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
